content.explanation:
**Birds & Astrology Vocabulary:**

**BIRDS (पक्षी):**
| English | Hindi |
|---------|-------|
| Sparrow | गौरैया |
| Pigeon | कबूतर |
| Cuckoo | कोयल |
| Parrot | तोता |
| Peacock | मोर |
| Owl | उल्लू |
| Eagle | चील/बाज़ |
| Kingfisher | राम चिरैया |
| Woodpecker | कठफोड़वा |
| Crane | सारस |
| Swan | हंस |
| Crow | कौआ |
| Flamingo | राजहंस |
| Nightingale | बुलबुल |

**ASTROLOGY (ज्योतिष):**
| English | Hindi |
|---------|-------|
| Zodiac sign | राशि |
| Aries | मेष |
| Taurus | वृषभ |
| Gemini | मिथुन |
| Cancer | कर्क |
| Leo | सिंह |
| Virgo | कन्या |
| Libra | तुला |
| Scorpio | वृश्चिक |
| Sagittarius | धनु |
| Capricorn | मकर |
| Aquarius | कुंभ |
| Pisces | मीन |
| Horoscope | जन्मकुंडली |
| Constellation | नक्षत्र मंडल |
rules: Birds = countable nouns: a sparrow, two eagles, several parrots
Bird sounds: crow = caws, cuckoo = calls, parrot = talks, eagle = screams
Collective nouns: a flock of birds / a murder of crows / a parliament of owls
Zodiac signs are proper nouns: Aries (not "the aries"), Leo (not "the leo")
Asking: "What is your sun sign?" / "What zodiac sign are you?"
Saying: "I am a Scorpio." / "She is a Virgo." (be + zodiac sign)
Astrology adjectives: "He has Aries-like qualities — bold and energetic."
content.memoryTrick:
**NATIONAL BIRDS:**
🇮🇳 India = Peacock (मोर)
🇬🇧 UK = Robin
🇺🇸 USA = Bald Eagle

**ZODIAC SIGNS = 12 months, 12 signs**
Aries (March) to Pisces (February) — know YOUR sign in English!

examples.hindi: गौरैया लुप्त होती जा रही है।

examples.english: The peacock is our national bird.

examples.hindi: वह Leo zodiac sign की है।
उल्लू रात को देखने में सक्षम होता है।
examples.english: Owls are capable of seeing at night.

examples.hindi: Scorpio लोग intense और passionate होते हैं।
examples.english: Scorpios are said to be intense and passionate.

examples.hindi: बाज़ की नज़र बहुत तेज़ होती है।

mistakes.why: Collective noun for crows = 'murder' (unusual but correct English)

mistakes.correct: What is your zodiac sign? / What is your sun sign?
mistakes.why: 'Zodiac' alone is incomplete — 'zodiac sign' or 'sun sign' is correct
Zodiac signs use 'a' not 'the' in this context

mistakes.correct: The parrot talks / mimics human speech.
mistakes.why: 'Talks' or 'mimics' is more natural for parrots than 'speaks'

speakingTips: Nature: 'I love watching birds — especially kingfishers near the river.'
Social icebreaker: 'I am a Libra — what is your zodiac sign?'
Interesting fact: 'Did you know that a group of owls is called a parliament?'

vocabulary.example: Birds migrate to warmer places in winter.
The dodo bird is now extinct.
Astrologers make prophecies based on stars.

practice.hindi: मोर भारत का राष्ट्रीय पक्षी है।
practice.english: Peacock is the national bird of India.
alternatives: india's national bird is the peacock.

practice.hindi: तोता बहुत चतुर पक्षी होता है।
practice.english: Parrot is a very clever bird.
The crow is a very cunning bird.
alternatives: crows are known for their intelligence.

practice.english: The dove/pigeon is a symbol of peace.
The owl can see at night.
practice.hint: owl = उल्लू, nocturnal = रात को सक्रिय

practice.hindi: मेष राशि वाले बहुत साहसी होते हैं।
मेरी जन्म कुंडली के अनुसार मेरा भाग्य अच्छा है।
practice.english: According to my birth chart, my fortune is good.
alternatives: my horoscope says my luck is good.

practice.hindi: कंगन तुला राशि का प्रतीक है।
practice.english: The scale is the symbol of Libra.
The rooster crows in the morning.
alternatives: a rooster calls in the morning.

practice.hindi: जल्दी उठने वाला पक्षी ही कीड़ा पाता है।
practice.english: The early bird catches the worm.
alternatives: those who wake up early succeed.
practice.hint: Proverb: early bird = सुबह जल्दी उठने वाला
